auth.label: API Token
auth.description: Timelink API token sent with the Authorization Bearer header. Create it in Mein Konto > API-Tokens: https://docs.timelink.io/api

actions.name: get_client
actions.description: Fetch one Timelink client by its identifier.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for fetching a record by ID.

anyOf.description: The numeric company identifier linked to the client.
The external tool identifier linked to the client.
The free-form client information text.
The client color value.

billable.description: Whether the client is billable by default.

anyOf.description: The client acronym.
The image identifier for this client.

demoFlag.description: Whether the client is a demo record.

anyOf.description: The number of projects returned for the client when present.
The number of active projects returned for the client when present.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when fetching a Timelink client.

actions.name: get_company
actions.description: Fetch the current Timelink company details for the authenticated token.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this Timelink action.

zip.description: The company ZIP or postal code.

anyOf.description: Whether Timelink forces OAuth for the company.
The OAuth provider configured for the company.
Whether Timelink auto-updates the subscription quantity.

quantity.description: The number of seats in the subscription.

trial.description: Whether the subscription is currently a trial.

anyOf.description: When the trial ends.
When the subscription ends.
The Timelink subscription details for the company.
The active Timelink pull provider.
The active Timelink push provider.
The raw Timelink company settings object.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when fetching Timelink company details.

actions.name: get_current_token
actions.description: Inspect the current Timelink API token metadata.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this Timelink action.

id.description: The numeric token identifier returned by Timelink.

name.description: The token name configured in Timelink.

abilities.description: The token abilities granted by Timelink.

anyOf.description: When the token was last used.
When the token expires.

updatedAt.description: When the token was last updated.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when fetching Timelink token details.

actions.name: get_project
actions.description: Fetch one Timelink project by its identifier.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for fetching a record by ID.

anyOf.description: The numeric client identifier linked to the project.
The external tool identifier linked to the project.
The free-form project information text.
The project color value.

billable.description: Whether the project is billable by default.

anyOf.description: The project acronym.
The image identifier for this project.

demoFlag.description: Whether the project is a demo record.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when fetching a Timelink project.

actions.name: get_service
actions.description: Fetch one Timelink service by its identifier.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for fetching a record by ID.

anyOf.description: The numeric company identifier linked to the service.
The external tool identifier linked to the service.
The free-form service information text.
The service color value.

billable.description: Whether the service is billable by default.

anyOf.description: The service acronym.
The image identifier for this service.
The default time entry description configured for the service.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when fetching a Timelink service.

actions.name: get_time_entry
actions.description: Fetch one Timelink time entry by its identifier.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for fetching a record by ID.

anyOf.description: The user identifier linked to the time entry.
The client identifier linked to the time entry.
The project identifier linked to the time entry.
The service identifier linked to the time entry.
The time entry description.

billable.description: Whether the time entry is billable.

billed.description: Whether the time entry has been billed.

anyOf.description: When the time entry was billed.

isInterrupt.description: Whether the time entry is marked as an interruption.

anyOf.description: When the time entry ended.

createdAt.description: When the time entry was created.

updatedAt.description: When the time entry was last updated.

anyOf.description: When the time entry was deleted.
The external tool identifier linked to the time entry.
The temporary identifier used by Timelink clients.
The Timelink push state value.

raw.description: The raw Timelink time entry object.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when fetching a Timelink time entry.

actions.name: get_user
actions.description: Fetch one Timelink user by its identifier.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for fetching a record by ID.

companyId.description: The company identifier linked to the user.

anyOf.description: When the user's email was verified.

lastUsed.description: The recent Timelink entities referenced by the user.

anyOf.description: The raw Timelink user settings object.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when fetching a Timelink user.

actions.name: list_active_time_entries
actions.description: List currently active Timelink time entries.

limit.description: The maximum number of active time entries to return.

withRelations.description: Whether Timelink should include related entities.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing active Timelink time entries.

anyOf.description: The user identifier linked to the time entry.
The client identifier linked to the time entry.
The project identifier linked to the time entry.
The service identifier linked to the time entry.
The time entry description.

billable.description: Whether the time entry is billable.

billed.description: Whether the time entry has been billed.

anyOf.description: When the time entry was billed.

isInterrupt.description: Whether the time entry is marked as an interruption.

anyOf.description: When the time entry ended.

createdAt.description: When the time entry was created.

updatedAt.description: When the time entry was last updated.

anyOf.description: When the time entry was deleted.
The external tool identifier linked to the time entry.
The temporary identifier used by Timelink clients.
The Timelink push state value.

raw.description: The raw Timelink time entry object.

from.description: The first item index on the current page.

anyOf.description: The page URL.

active.description: Whether this pagination link is active.

items.description: A pagination link returned by Timelink.

links.description: The pagination links returned by Timelink.

path.description: The Timelink API path for this paginated response.

perPage.description: The number of items returned per page.

to.description: The last item index on the current page.

total.description: The total number of items across all pages.

pagination.description: Pagination metadata returned by Timelink list endpoints.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing active Timelink time entries.

actions.name: list_clients
actions.description: List Timelink clients with optional filtering and pagination parameters.

limit.description: The maximum number of records to return.

search.description: A search string matched by Timelink.

ids.description: A list of Timelink record IDs to fetch.

column.description: The Timelink field name used for sorting.

orders.description: The Timelink sort rules to apply.

withLimitedPartOfProjects.description: Whether Timelink should include a limited subset of each client's projects.

projectsLimit.description: The number of nested projects to include per client.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing Timelink clients.

anyOf.description: The numeric company identifier linked to the client.
The external tool identifier linked to the client.
The free-form client information text.
The client color value.

billable.description: Whether the client is billable by default.

anyOf.description: The client acronym.
The image identifier for this client.

demoFlag.description: Whether the client is a demo record.

anyOf.description: The number of projects returned for the client when present.
The number of active projects returned for the client when present.

clients.description: The Timelink clients returned by the API.

from.description: The first item index on the current page.

anyOf.description: The page URL.

active.description: Whether this pagination link is active.

items.description: A pagination link returned by Timelink.

links.description: The pagination links returned by Timelink.

path.description: The Timelink API path for this paginated response.

perPage.description: The number of items returned per page.

to.description: The last item index on the current page.

total.description: The total number of items across all pages.

pagination.description: Pagination metadata returned by Timelink list endpoints.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing Timelink clients.

limit.description: The maximum number of records to return.

search.description: A search string matched by Timelink.

ids.description: A list of Timelink record IDs to fetch.

column.description: The Timelink field name used for sorting.

orders.description: The Timelink sort rules to apply.

withRelations.description: Whether Timelink should include related entities.

start.description: Filter time entries starting from this timestamp.

end.description: Filter time entries ending before this timestamp.

onlyDeleted.description: Whether to return only deleted time entries.

isInterrupt.description: Filter time entries by interruption state.

isBilled.description: Filter time entries by billed state.

isBillable.description: Filter time entries by billable state.

searchInDescription.description: The Timelink description search mode or term passed through to the API.

clientId.description: Filter time entries by client identifier.

projectId.description: Filter time entries by project identifier.

serviceId.description: Filter time entries by service identifier.

userId.description: Filter time entries by user identifier.

userIds.description: Filter time entries by multiple user identifiers.

extToolId.description: Filter time entries by external tool identifier.

exact.description: Whether the Timelink search should be exact.

anyOf.description: The user identifier linked to the time entry.

The temporary identifier used by Timelink clients.
The Timelink push state value.
